biography: Van Doude was born on May 28, 1926 in Haarlem, Noord-Holland, Netherlands. He was an actor, known for Love in the Afternoon (1957), Breathless (1960) and The Day of the Jackal (1973). He was married to Alberte Robert. He died on August 18, 2018 in Clichy, Hauts-de-Seine, France.
name: Van Doude
